items.title: XLIEVO 250 Anniversary USA Shirt Mens: American Flag 4th of July Independence Day Costumes Crew Neck Short Sleeve T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: xlievo, 250, anniversary, usa, mens, american, flag, 4th, july, independence, day, costumes. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
